input: which college has produced the most first round picks
output: SELECT college, COUNT(*) AS first_round_picks FROM player WHERE draft_round = '1' AND college IS NOT NULL AND college != '' GROUP BY college ORDER BY first_round_picks DESC LIMIT 5;

input: which college has produced the most number one picks
output: SELECT college, COUNT(*) AS num_picks FROM player WHERE draft_number = '1' AND college IS NOT NULL GROUP BY college ORDER BY num_picks DESC LIMIT 5;

input: lebron james college
output: SELECT player_name, college FROM player WHERE player_name = 'LeBron James';

input: what college did kobe go to
output: SELECT player_name, college FROM player WHERE player_name = 'Kobe Bryant';

input: what college did kevin garnett go to
output: SELECT player_name, college FROM player WHERE player_name = 'Kevin Garnett';

input: players who went to the same college as lebron james
output: SELECT player_name, college FROM player WHERE college = (SELECT college FROM player WHERE player_name = 'LeBron James') AND player_name != 'LeBron James';

input: what country is dirk from
output: SELECT player_name, country FROM player WHERE player_name = 'Dirk Nowitzki';

input: all players from the same country as giannis
output: SELECT player_name FROM player WHERE country = (SELECT country FROM player WHERE player_name = 'Giannis Antetokounmpo') AND player_name != 'Giannis Antetokounmpo';

input: when was stephen curry drafted and what pick
output: SELECT player_name, draft_year, draft_round, draft_number FROM player WHERE player_name = 'Stephen Curry';

input: players drafted in the same year as lebron james 2003
output: SELECT player_name, draft_round, draft_number FROM player WHERE draft_year = 2003 ORDER BY CAST(draft_round AS INTEGER), CAST(draft_number AS INTEGER);

input: players drafted before pick 5 in 2003
output: SELECT player_name, draft_number FROM player WHERE draft_year = 2003 AND CAST(draft_number AS INTEGER) < 5 ORDER BY CAST(draft_number AS INTEGER);

input: who was drafted right after dwight howard in 2004
output: SELECT player_name, draft_number FROM player WHERE draft_year = 2004 AND CAST(draft_number AS INTEGER) = 2;

input: players who lasted more than 15 seasons in the nba
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(DISTINCT pg.season_id) AS total_seasons FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pg.season_id) > 15 ORDER BY total_seasons DESC;

input: players who lasted fewer than 3 seasons
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(DISTINCT pg.season_id) AS total_seasons FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pg.season_id) < 3 ORDER BY total_seasons;

input: which player had the most seasons playing 70 or more games
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS seasons_70_plus FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.gp >= 70 GROUP BY p.player_name ORDER BY seasons_70_plus DESC LIMIT 5;

input: players who played at least one game in every season from 2010 to 2020
output: SELECT p.player_name FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.season_id BETWEEN 22009 AND 22019 GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pg.season_id) = 11 ORDER BY p.player_name;

input: players active in the 2005 season who were also active in 2015
output: SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg1 ON p.player_id = pg1.player_id AND pg1.season_id = 22004 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg2 ON p.player_id = pg2.player_id AND pg2.season_id = 22014 ORDER BY p.player_name;

input: players drafted in 2010 still playing in 2020
output: SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.draft_year = 2010 AND pg.season_id = 22019 ORDER BY p.player_name;

input: how many players from the 2003 draft class are still in the league in 2015
output: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_id) AS active_players FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.draft_year = 2003 AND pg.season_id = 22014;

input: players who debuted in 2010 draft and averaged 15 ppg in their first season min 30 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE p.draft_year = 2010 AND ps.season_id = 22010 AND ps.pts >= 15 AND ps.gp >= 30 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: lebron best season by total points

output: SELECT ps.season_id, ps.ast FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Magic Johnson' AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.ast DESC LIMIT 1;

input: stockton best season by total assists
output: SELECT pg.season_id, pg.ast FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'John Stockton' ORDER BY pg.ast DESC LIMIT 1;

output: SELECT pg.season_id, pg.blk FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Hakeem Olajuwon' ORDER BY pg.blk DESC LIMIT 1;

input: curry best season by total three pointers made
output: SELECT pg.season_id, pg.fg3m FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Stephen Curry' ORDER BY pg.fg3m DESC LIMIT 1;

input: westbrook best season by triple doubles
output: SELECT pg.season_id, pg.td3 FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Russell Westbrook' ORDER BY pg.td3 DESC LIMIT 1;

input: which season had the most triple doubles league wide
output: SELECT pg.season_id, SUM(pg.td3) AS total_td3 FROM player_general_traditional_total pg GROUP BY pg.season_id ORDER BY total_td3 DESC LIMIT 1;

input: which season had the most total threes made league wide
output: SELECT pg.season_id, SUM(pg.fg3m) AS total_fg3m FROM player_general_traditional_total pg GROUP BY pg.season_id ORDER BY total_fg3m DESC LIMIT 1;

input: which season had the most total points scored league wide
output: SELECT pg.season_id, SUM(pg.pts) AS total_pts FROM player_general_traditional_total pg GROUP BY pg.season_id ORDER BY total_pts DESC LIMIT 1;

input: which season had the fewest total points scored league wide
output: SELECT pg.season_id, SUM(pg.pts) AS total_pts FROM player_general_traditional_total pg GROUP BY pg.season_id ORDER BY total_pts ASC LIMIT 1;

input: is scoring in the nba going up or down over the years
output: SELECT ps.season_id, AVG(ps.pts) AS avg_pts FROM player_season ps WHERE ps.gp >= 20 GROUP BY ps.season_id ORDER BY ps.season_id;

input: has three point volume increased over the years
output: SELECT pg.season_id, SUM(pg.fg3a) AS total_fg3a FROM player_general_traditional_total pg GROUP BY pg.season_id ORDER BY pg.season_id;

input: how has the average rebounds per game changed over time min 20 games
output: SELECT ps.season_id, AVG(ps.reb) AS avg_reb FROM player_season ps WHERE ps.gp >= 20 GROUP BY ps.season_id ORDER BY ps.season_id;

input: players who shot over 45 percent from three in multiple seasons min 100 attempts each season
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS seasons FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.fg3_pct > 0.45 AND pg.fg3a >= 100 GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY seasons DESC;

input: players who averaged over 25 ppg in multiple seasons min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS seasons FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.pts > 25 AND ps.gp >= 50 GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY seasons DESC;

input: players who led the league in scoring more than once min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS scoring_titles FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.pts = (SELECT MAX(ps2.pts) FROM player_season ps2 WHERE ps2.season_id = ps.season_id AND ps2.gp >= 50) AND ps.gp >= 50 GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY scoring_titles DESC;

input: players who led the league in assists more than once min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS ast_titles FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.ast = (SELECT MAX(ps2.ast) FROM player_season ps2 WHERE ps2.season_id = ps.season_id AND ps2.gp >= 50) AND ps.gp >= 50 GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY ast_titles DESC;

input: players who led the league in blocks more than once
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS blk_titles FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.blk = (SELECT MAX(pg2.blk) FROM player_general_traditional_total pg2 WHERE pg2.season_id = pg.season_id) GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY blk_titles DESC;

input: players who led the league in steals more than once min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS stl_titles FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.stl = (SELECT MAX(pg2.stl) FROM player_general_traditional_total pg2 WHERE pg2.season_id = pg.season_id) AND pg.gp >= 50 GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY stl_titles DESC;

input: which season had the highest number of players averaging 20 ppg min 50 games
output: SELECT ps.season_id, COUNT(*) AS num_players FROM player_season ps WHERE ps.pts >= 20 AND ps.gp >= 50 GROUP BY ps.season_id ORDER BY num_players DESC LIMIT 1;

input: which season had the most players with a triple double average min 50 games
output: SELECT ps.season_id, COUNT(*) AS num_players FROM player_season ps WHERE ps.pts >= 10 AND ps.reb >= 10 AND ps.ast >= 10 AND ps.gp >= 50 GROUP BY ps.season_id ORDER BY num_players DESC LIMIT 1;

input: lebron vs kobe vs mj total career triple doubles
output: SELECT p.player_name, SUM(pg.td3) AS career_td3 FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.player_name IN ('LeBron James', 'Kobe Bryant', 'Michael Jordan') GROUP BY p.player_name ORDER BY career_td3 DESC;

input: compare shaq dwight and hakeem career blocks total

input: compare curry klay and dame career three pointers made

input: who has more career steals lebron or kobe

input: compare tim duncan and kevin garnett career rebounds total

input: who had better career net rating min 50 games per season giannis or jokic

input: compare career true shooting percentage min 50 games per season for durant and leonard

input: all nba seasons played by lebron james
output: SELECT pg.season_id, t.city, t.nickname, pg.gp, pg.w, pg.l FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id JOIN team t ON pg.team_id = t.team_id WHERE p.player_name = 'LeBron James' ORDER BY pg.season_id;

input: all seasons played by tim duncan with wins and losses

input: how many teams did jason kidd play for in his career

input: how many teams did carmelo anthony play for
output: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pg.team_id) AS num_teams FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Carmelo Anthony';

input: players who scored over 20 ppg in a season and were under 6 feet tall min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.pts, ps.player_height FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.pts >= 20 AND ps.player_height_inches < 72 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: tallest player to lead the league in assists in any season min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.player_height_inches, ps.ast, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.ast = (SELECT MAX(ps2.ast) FROM player_season ps2 WHERE ps2.season_id = ps.season_id AND ps2.gp >= 50) AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.player_height_inches DESC LIMIT 1;

input: shortest player to average over 20 ppg in a season min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.player_height_inches, ps.pts, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.pts >= 20 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.player_height_inches ASC LIMIT 1;

input: what is the average height of nba players who average over 20 ppg min 50 games
output: SELECT AVG(ps.player_height_inches) AS avg_height FROM player_season ps WHERE ps.pts >= 20 AND ps.gp >= 50;

input: heaviest player to average over 5 assists per game in a season min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.player_weight, ps.ast, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.ast >= 5 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.player_weight DESC LIMIT 1;

input: players over 280 pounds who averaged over 15 ppg in a season min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.player_weight, ps.pts, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.player_weight >= 280 AND ps.pts >= 15 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: lightest player to average over 20 ppg in a season min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.player_weight, ps.pts, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.pts >= 20 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.player_weight ASC LIMIT 1;

input: players taller than 7 feet who averaged over 15 points in a season min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.player_height, ps.pts, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.player_height_inches > 84 AND ps.pts >= 15 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: smallest player in nba history by height in any season
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.player_height_inches, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.player_height_inches IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ps.player_height_inches ASC LIMIT 1;

input: players from the same country who played on the same team in the same season 2022
output: SELECT p1.player_name, p2.player_name, p1.country, t.nickname FROM player p1 JOIN player p2 ON p1.country = p2.country AND p1.player_id < p2.player_id JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg1 ON p1.player_id = pg1.player_id AND pg1.season_id = 22021 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg2 ON p2.player_id = pg2.player_id AND pg2.season_id = 22021 AND pg1.team_id = pg2.team_id JOIN team t ON pg1.team_id = t.team_id WHERE p1.country != 'USA' ORDER BY p1.country LIMIT 20;

input: players who played in 2000 and 2010
output: SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg1 ON p.player_id = pg1.player_id AND pg1.season_id = 21999 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg2 ON p.player_id = pg2.player_id AND pg2.season_id = 22009 ORDER BY p.player_name;

input: which player had the biggest gap between their best and worst scoring season min 30 games each
output: SELECT p.player_name, MAX(ps.pts) - MIN(ps.pts) AS pts_range FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.gp >= 30 GROUP BY p.player_name ORDER BY pts_range DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players who scored exactly the same ppg in back to back seasons min 30 games each within 0.1 points
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps1.season_id, ps1.pts, ps2.pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps1 ON p.player_id = ps1.player_id JOIN player_season ps2 ON p.player_id = ps2.player_id AND ps2.season_id = ps1.season_id + 1 WHERE ps1.gp >= 30 AND ps2.gp >= 30 AND ABS(ps1.pts - ps2.pts) <= 0.1 ORDER BY ps1.pts DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players who played more games one season than any other in their career
output: SELECT p.player_name, MAX(pg.gp) AS max_gp FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id GROUP BY p.player_name ORDER BY max_gp DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players who had at least 10 seasons with over 1000 total points
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS seasons FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.pts >= 1000 GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY seasons DESC;

input: teams that had the most players score over 1000 total points in 2019

input: teams with most players over 10 ppg average in 2020 min 40 games

input: which team had the most balanced scoring in 2021 fewest points difference between their top and second scorer min 40 games each

output: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ps.team_id) AS num_teams FROM player_season ps WHERE ps.season_id = 22021 AND ps.pts >= 25 AND ps.gp >= 50;

input: players with positive plus minus and over 20 ppg in 2021 min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.pts, pg.plus_minus FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id AND ps.season_id = pg.season_id WHERE ps.season_id = 22020 AND ps.pts >= 20 AND pg.plus_minus > 0 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: players with negative plus minus despite being top 20 scorers in 2019 min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.pts, pg.plus_minus FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id AND ps.season_id = pg.season_id WHERE ps.season_id = 22018 AND ps.gp >= 50 AND pg.plus_minus < 0 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC LIMIT 20;

input: best scoring players who also had a winning record in 2018 min 50 games w pct over 50
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.pts, pg.w_pct FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id AND ps.season_id = pg.season_id WHERE ps.season_id = 22017 AND ps.pts >= 20 AND pg.w_pct >= 0.5 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: players with high assists and high net rating in 2020 min 50 games ast over 7 net over 5
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.ast, ps.net_rating FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.season_id = 22019 AND ps.ast >= 7 AND ps.net_rating >= 5 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.ast DESC;

input: all players who had a better net rating than lebron in 2018 min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.net_rating FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.season_id = 22017 AND ps.gp >= 50 AND ps.net_rating > (SELECT ps2.net_rating FROM player p2 JOIN player_season ps2 ON p2.player_id = ps2.player_id WHERE p2.player_name = 'LeBron James' AND ps2.season_id = 22017) ORDER BY ps.net_rating DESC;

input: players who scored more total points than lebron in 2023
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg.pts FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.season_id = 22022 AND pg.pts > (SELECT pg2.pts FROM player p2 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg2 ON p2.player_id = pg2.player_id WHERE p2.player_name = 'LeBron James' AND pg2.season_id = 22022) ORDER BY pg.pts DESC;

input: players who had a higher ppg than kobe in his best scoring season min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.pts, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.pts > (SELECT MAX(ps2.pts) FROM player p2 JOIN player_season ps2 ON p2.player_id = ps2.player_id WHERE p2.player_name = 'Kobe Bryant' AND ps2.gp >= 50) AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players drafted after pick 20 who ended up averaging over 20 ppg in a season min 50 games
output: SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name, ps.pts, ps.season_id, p.draft_number FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE CAST(p.draft_number AS INTEGER) > 20 AND ps.pts >= 20 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC LIMIT 10;

input: biggest draft steals by ppg average min 300 games players drafted after pick 15
output: SELECT p.player_name, AVG(ps.pts) AS avg_pts, p.draft_number FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE CAST(p.draft_number AS INTEGER) > 15 AND p.draft_round = '1' GROUP BY p.player_name, p.draft_number HAVING SUM(ps.gp) >= 300 ORDER BY avg_pts DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players drafted number 1 overall and their career scoring averages min 200 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, p.draft_year, AVG(ps.pts) AS avg_pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE p.draft_number = '1' AND p.draft_round = '1' GROUP BY p.player_name, p.draft_year HAVING SUM(ps.gp) >= 200 ORDER BY avg_pts DESC;

input: which number 2 picks had the best careers by scoring average min 200 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, p.draft_year, AVG(ps.pts) AS avg_pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE p.draft_number = '2' AND p.draft_round = '1' GROUP BY p.player_name, p.draft_year HAVING SUM(ps.gp) >= 200 ORDER BY avg_pts DESC LIMIT 5;

input: how does average career scoring compare between first and second round picks min 200 games
output: SELECT p.draft_round, AVG(ps.pts) AS avg_pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE p.draft_round IN ('1', '2') GROUP BY p.draft_round HAVING SUM(ps.gp) >= 200 ORDER BY avg_pts DESC;

input: players who were never drafted but played over 500 career games
output: SELECT p.player_name, SUM(pg.gp) AS career_gp FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.draft_round = 'Undrafted' GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING SUM(pg.gp) >= 500 ORDER BY career_gp DESC;

input: best undrafted players by career scoring average min 300 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, AVG(ps.pts) AS avg_pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE p.draft_round = 'Undrafted' GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING SUM(ps.gp) >= 300 ORDER BY avg_pts DESC LIMIT 10;

input: which player had the most total points in their final season min 40 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg.pts, pg.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.season_id = (SELECT MAX(season_id) FROM player_general_traditional_total WHERE player_id = p.player_id) AND pg.gp >= 40 ORDER BY pg.pts DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players who were drafted in the same year and ended up on the same team in 2020
output: SELECT p1.player_name, p2.player_name, p1.draft_year, t.nickname FROM player p1 JOIN player p2 ON p1.draft_year = p2.draft_year AND p1.player_id < p2.player_id JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg1 ON p1.player_id = pg1.player_id AND pg1.season_id = 22019 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg2 ON p2.player_id = pg2.player_id AND pg2.season_id = 22019 AND pg1.team_id = pg2.team_id JOIN team t ON pg1.team_id = t.team_id ORDER BY p1.draft_year LIMIT 20;

input: show me how lebrons scoring has changed from his first season to now
output: SELECT ps.season_id, ps.pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'LeBron James' ORDER BY ps.season_id;

input: show me how dirks scoring changed across his career
output: SELECT ps.season_id, ps.pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Dirk Nowitzki' ORDER BY ps.season_id;

input: show me every season giannis played and his ppg and rpg
output: SELECT ps.season_id, ps.pts, ps.reb FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Giannis Antetokounmpo' ORDER BY ps.season_id;

input: show me jokics assist totals by season
output: SELECT pg.season_id, pg.ast FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Nikola Jokic' ORDER BY pg.season_id;

input: currys three point totals by season
output: SELECT pg.season_id, pg.fg3m, pg.fg3a FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Stephen Curry' ORDER BY pg.season_id;

input: how have the spurs done every season wins and losses in the database
output: SELECT pg.season_id, pg.w, pg.l FROM player_general_traditional_total pg JOIN team t ON pg.team_id = t.team_id WHERE t.nickname = 'Spurs' GROUP BY pg.season_id, pg.w, pg.l ORDER BY pg.season_id;

input: warriors wins and losses every season in the database
output: SELECT pg.season_id, pg.w, pg.l FROM player_general_traditional_total pg JOIN team t ON pg.team_id = t.team_id WHERE t.nickname = 'Warriors' GROUP BY pg.season_id, pg.w, pg.l ORDER BY pg.season_id;

input: lakers wins and losses every season in the database
output: SELECT pg.season_id, pg.w, pg.l FROM player_general_traditional_total pg JOIN team t ON pg.team_id = t.team_id WHERE t.nickname = 'Lakers' GROUP BY pg.season_id, pg.w, pg.l ORDER BY pg.season_id;

input: which team improved the most in wins from their worst to best season in the database
output: SELECT t.nickname, MAX(pg.w) - MIN(pg.w) AS win_improvement FROM team t JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON t.team_id = pg.team_id GROUP BY t.nickname ORDER BY win_improvement DESC LIMIT 5;

input: which team has been the most consistent by lowest standard deviation in wins
output: SELECT t.nickname, AVG(pg.w) AS avg_wins FROM team t JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON t.team_id = pg.team_id GROUP BY t.nickname ORDER BY avg_wins DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players who scored at least 15 ppg in both 2018 and 2022 min 50 games each
output: SELECT p.player_name FROM player p JOIN player_season ps18 ON p.player_id = ps18.player_id AND ps18.season_id = 22017 JOIN player_season ps22 ON p.player_id = ps22.player_id AND ps22.season_id = 22021 WHERE ps18.pts >= 15 AND ps22.pts >= 15 AND ps18.gp >= 50 AND ps22.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps22.pts DESC;

input: players who averaged over 20 ppg in 2015 and were still active in 2020 min 50 games each
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps15.pts AS pts_2015, ps20.pts AS pts_2020 FROM player p JOIN player_season ps15 ON p.player_id = ps15.player_id AND ps15.season_id = 22014 JOIN player_season ps20 ON p.player_id = ps20.player_id AND ps20.season_id = 22019 WHERE ps15.pts >= 20 AND ps15.gp >= 50 AND ps20.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps15.pts DESC;

input: players with the most consistent scoring over their career lowest variance min 5 seasons 30 games each
output: SELECT p.player_name, AVG(ps.pts) AS avg_pts, MAX(ps.pts) - MIN(ps.pts) AS pts_range FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.gp >= 30 GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY pts_range ASC LIMIT 10;

input: teams with the most home games in the database ever
output: SELECT t.city, t.nickname, COUNT(*) AS total_home_games FROM game g JOIN team t ON g.team_id_home_id = t.team_id GROUP BY t.city, t.nickname ORDER BY total_home_games DESC LIMIT 5;

input: which city has hosted the most nba games as home team
output: SELECT t.city, COUNT(*) AS total_games FROM game g JOIN team t ON g.team_id_home_id = t.team_id GROUP BY t.city ORDER BY total_games DESC LIMIT 5;

input: how many different players have played for the lakers all time
output: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pg.player_id) AS total_players FROM player_general_traditional_total pg JOIN team t ON pg.team_id = t.team_id WHERE t.nickname = 'Lakers';

input: how many different players have suited up for the knicks all time
output: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pg.player_id) AS total_players FROM player_general_traditional_total pg JOIN team t ON pg.team_id = t.team_id WHERE t.nickname = 'Knicks';

input: players who put up monster totals over 2000 pts 600 reb and 400 ast in the same season 2018
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg.pts, pg.reb, pg.ast FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.season_id = 22017 AND pg.pts >= 2000 AND pg.reb >= 600 AND pg.ast >= 400 ORDER BY pg.pts DESC;

input: players who led their team in all three of points rebounds and assists in 2022 min 40 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.pts, ps.reb, ps.ast, t.nickname FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id JOIN team t ON ps.team_id = t.team_id WHERE ps.season_id = 22021 AND ps.gp >= 40 AND ps.pts = (SELECT MAX(ps2.pts) FROM player_season ps2 WHERE ps2.team_id = ps.team_id AND ps2.season_id = ps.season_id) AND ps.reb = (SELECT MAX(ps3.reb) FROM player_season ps3 WHERE ps3.team_id = ps.team_id AND ps3.season_id = ps.season_id) AND ps.ast = (SELECT MAX(ps4.ast) FROM player_season ps4 WHERE ps4.team_id = ps.team_id AND ps4.season_id = ps.season_id) ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;
